name: llm-wiki
description: LLM-compiled knowledge base plugin. Natural language routing, session resume, concurrent-safe indexes, topic-isolated wikis, parallel multi-agent research, thesis-driven investigation, repo assessment, Obsidian dual-linking, retardmax mode, and --min-time sustained research.

plugins.name: wiki
plugins.description: LLM-compiled knowledge base. Commands: /wiki (natural language router + init/status), /wiki:ingest, /wiki:compile, /wiki:query (quick/standard/deep/--resume), /wiki:research (5-10 parallel agents, --new-topic, --min-time), /wiki:thesis, /wiki:assess, /wiki:plan, /wiki:lint, /wiki:output, /wiki:retract.
